description: This pipeline generates ROI statistics for macrophages. It starts with converting labels to ROI, then calculates the ROI statistics and finally exports the results as a table.

c25eb7f9-1860-4efd-abf1-3a260d542d61.name: ij1-labels-to-roi
c25eb7f9-1860-4efd-abf1-3a260d542d61.description: Converts a label image into a set of ROI. Labels must have a value larger than zero to be detected.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice. The Z/C/T coordinates of the source slices are saved inside the ROI.

a65b6798-e945-4280-8552-1b731de9915a.name: ij1-roi-statistics
a65b6798-e945-4280-8552-1b731de9915a.description:
Generates a results table containing ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, an empty reference image is automatically generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
